description_long: This is a robust, urban-style gate set within a series of dark stone or brick walls, featuring three distinct arched metal sections with vertical bars and pointed finials. The gate is flanked and supported by thick masonry pillars, each topped with a capstone, giving the structure a fortified appearance. The metalwork of the gate is black and features simple, utilitarian vertical bars with decorative pointed tips, providing both security and a modest decorative touch. The base of the structure is a paved stone pathway that runs through the length of the gate, suggesting it is designed for pedestrian or light vehicle access. The overall construction appears heavy and durable, suitable for use in urban environments such as parks, residential entrances, or institutional boundaries. The design balances security with a touch of classic urban elegance, making it both functional and visually appealing.
description: A heavy, dark stone or brick gate with three arched black metal sections and pointed finials, set over a paved stone pathway. Supported by thick masonry pillars, it combines security with understated decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing three arched metal gate sections with pointed finials, framed by thick stone or brick pillars and walls.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the paved stone pathway running through the gate, with the masonry walls and pillars visible along the sides.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the back of the arched metal gate sections and the supporting masonry structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the length of the paved pathway and the alignment of the stone or brick walls and pillars.
attribute_surrounding_structure: stone or brick walls with masonry pillars
